mapper.select: SELECT pr.production_order_id, pr.production_order_code, pr.po_id, po.po_code, pr.production_issue_date, pr.client_id, pr.manager_id, pr.production_due_date, pr.production_status, pr.production_client_name, pr.production_country, pr.production_manager_name, pr.production_item_name, pr.production_linked_documents, pr.created_at, pr.updated_at FROM production_orders pr JOIN purchase_orders po ON pr.po_id = po.po_id WHERE pr.production_order_code = #{productionOrderId}

SELECT pr.production_order_id, pr.production_order_code, pr.po_id, po.po_code, pr.production_issue_date, pr.client_id, pr.manager_id, pr.production_due_date, pr.production_status, pr.production_client_name, pr.production_country, pr.production_manager_name, pr.production_item_name, pr.production_linked_documents, pr.created_at, pr.updated_at FROM production_orders pr JOIN purchase_orders po ON pr.po_id = po.po_id ORDER BY pr.production_order_id

SELECT pr.production_order_id, pr.production_order_code, pr.po_id, po.po_code, pr.production_issue_date, pr.client_id, pr.manager_id, pr.production_due_date, pr.production_status, pr.production_client_name, pr.production_country, pr.production_manager_name, pr.production_item_name, pr.production_linked_documents, pr.created_at, pr.updated_at FROM production_orders pr JOIN purchase_orders po ON pr.po_id = po.po_id ORDER BY pr.production_order_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM production_orders pr JOIN purchase_orders po ON pr.po_id = po.po_id
